## ExtractActionPayload type

Returns the payload for an action given the module name and the action name.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare type ExtractActionPayload<ModuleName extends XModuleName, ActionName extends ActionNamesFor<ModuleName>> = ExtractPayload<ExtractActions<XModulesTree[ModuleName]>[ActionName]>;
```
